name: @gi-nx/clipper2-wasm
description: Fork of clipper2-wasm with memory-leak fixes in the JS helpers (MakePath64, MakePathD, PathDToPath64, etc.) and updated Emscripten build flags. Drop-in replacement for clipper2-wasm@0.2.1.
author: Erik Sombroek <eriksombroek@gmail.com> (fork maintained by Giraffe)
